generated.as:
setweight(to_tsvector('english', coalesce("canonical_name", '')), 'A') ||
          setweight(to_tsvector('english', coalesce("concise_definition", '')), 'B') ||
          setweight(to_tsvector('english',
            coalesce("synthesis_markdown", '') || ' ' ||
            coalesce("why_it_exists_markdown", '') || ' ' ||
            coalesce("mechanism_markdown", '') || ' ' ||
            coalesce("examples_markdown", '') || ' ' ||
            coalesce("counterexamples_markdown", '') || ' ' ||
            coalesce("failure_modes_markdown", '') || ' ' ||
            coalesce("common_confusions_markdown", '')
          ), 'C')

mastery_evidence_content_check.name: mastery_evidence_content_check
mastery_evidence_content_check.value: "mastery_evidence"."note" is not null or "mastery_evidence"."artifact_url" is not null

source_segments_page_range_check.name: source_segments_page_range_check
source_segments_page_range_check.value: "source_segments"."page_start" is null or ("source_segments"."page_start" > 0 and ("source_segments"."page_end" is null or "source_segments"."page_end" >= "source_segments"."page_start"))

sources_workspace_checksum_active_unique.name: sources_workspace_checksum_active_unique
sources_workspace_checksum_active_unique.where: "sources"."file_checksum_sha256" is not null and "sources"."deleted_at" is null

sources_origin_fields_check.name: sources_origin_fields_check
sources_origin_fields_check.value:
("sources"."origin" = 'file' and "sources"."file_name" is not null and "sources"."external_url" is null)
          or ("sources"."origin" = 'url' and "sources"."external_url" is not null)
